next_steps: Image-guided core needle biopsy of the retroperitoneal or mediastinal soft-tissue mass
Serum IgG4 level measurement and testing for BRAF V600E mutation
Evaluation for diabetes insipidus with serum/urine osmolality and electrolytes
Histopathological and immunohistochemical staining of biopsy specimen (including CD68, CD1a, S100, and IgG4/IgG ratio)
Targeted ultrasound or CT-guided biopsy of retroperitoneal soft-tissue mass
Histopathology including CD68, CD1a, S100, and IgG4/IgG ratio staining
Testing for BRAF V600E mutation on tissue specimen
Serum and urine protein electrophoresis with immunofixation
Evaluation for diabetes insipidus with serum/urine osmolality and electrolytes
Full skeletal survey or focused review of prior imaging for osteosclerosis
